stemHtml: Which of the following statements about the INS and IRS is true?

options.a: INS is an older system that uses gyros. IRS is a newer version that uses lasers.
options.b: ​INS and IRS are two completely different systems with no similarities.
options.c: The INS and IRS are identical systems with separate names chosen by the manufacturers.
options.d: IRS is an older system that uses gyros.
